Enhanced 5% Sample Indicator CHAR 1
CRNT_BIC_CD Current Beneficiary Identification Code CHAR 2
STATE_CD SSA State Code CHAR 2
COUNTY_CD SSA County Code CHAR 3
ZIP_CD 5-digit ZIP Code CHAR 5
STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_01 FIPS State-County Code - January CHAR 5
STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_02 FIPS State-County Code - February CHAR 5
STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_03 FIPS State-County Code - March CHAR 5

STATE_CNTY_FIPS_CD_05 FIPS State-County Code - May CHAR
